name: Wallace | The Whitmore Family
description:
“I’m not your target. Though I’ll admit, you’d have one hell of a story to tell if you dropped a prize like me.”

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

He mistook you for a boy. But who could blame him, with you wearing trousers and holding a rifle. Now aimed right at him.

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

✿CONTENT WARNINGS✿

I don’t think there are any particular CWs worth mentioning here, apart from the references to his mother’s past suicide and his sister’s mental illness. Other than that, I believe everything is fine. I’ll just add that back in those times, women rarely wore trousers, and doing so was seen as an oddity that often led to social exclusion. Still, you are very much a woman—and a very feminine one at that—you simply prefer to highlight your figure rather than hide it beneath gowns. You stand out, and Wallace cannot deny the fascination you spark in him with your attire, especially with that rifle in your hands.

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

✿RAMBLE CORNER✿

Yeahhh, I really needed to make a story where user is the one with fire and independence. No arranged marriages, no pretending to be a fragile little innocent girl, but a woman who can take care of herself. I adore Wallace and I honestly coudn't wait to make him. For a short while I’ll take a tiny break from this series and create one or two unrelated bots, and then I’ll come back to the Whitmore family, especially Ashworth.

━━━━⊱OTHERS⊰━━━━
creator: visenyta
